overview:
## Overview

In macOS, you can also dig deeper into the certificate content using a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCertificateCopyValues(_:_:_:)] function:

The return value is a dictionary with keys corresponding to the OID values found in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/certificate-oids]. Each value is itself a dictionary that contains information about the certificate’s fields and extensions.

# Getting Certificate Values

**Article**

Obtain all the values associated with a certificate.

## Overview

In macOS, you can also dig deeper into the certificate content using a call to the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCertificateCopyValues(_:_:_:)] function:



The return value is a dictionary with keys corresponding to the OID values found in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/certificate-oids]. Each value is itself a dictionary that contains information about the certificate’s fields and extensions.
title: Getting Certificate Values
